TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u sulit nu hulam:被戰敗 tinaku a kamu bulaw sa ku Hulam tu Sakizaya a tademaw. . babulawan 戰場 na u babulawan kina alangahay.這條河曾是戰場. bulawan 戰爭 bulawan nu Hulam ku Takubuwan i a miheca siwaay a bulad, katuud ku mapataay u zuma milaliw tacuwacuwa a niyazu'. 1878 年的 9 . mababulaw 打仗 mababulaw ku Sakizaya atu Hulam i sumamad. . mabulaw 被戰敗 mabulaw nu Hulam ku Takubuwan. 達固湖灣被清兵戰敗. mibulaw 發動戰爭 mibulaw ku ada tu niyazu' niyam. . nababulawan 戰爭過之地 nababulawan i tawya ku Takubuwan. .
S.PHON: u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam:*** tinaku a kamu bur~ɾaw sa ku ħur~ɾam tu sakizaja a tadəmaw. . babur~ɾawan ** na u babur~ɾawan kina ar~ɾaŋaħaj.*******. bur~ɾawan ** bur~ɾawan nu ħur~ɾam ku takubuwan i a miħəʦa siwaaj a bur~ɾad, katuud ku mapataaj u zuma mir~ɾar~ɾiw taʦuwaʦuwa a nijazuʔ~ʡ. **** ** * . mababur~ɾaw ** mababur~ɾaw ku sakizaja atu ħur~ɾam i sumamad. . mabur~ɾaw *** mabur~ɾaw nu ħur~ɾam ku takubuwan. *********. mibur~ɾaw **** mibur~ɾaw ku ada tu nijazuʔ~ʡ nijam. . nababur~ɾawan ***** nababur~ɾawan i tawja ku takubuwan. .
S.FORM: u sulit nu hulam:被戰敗 tinaku a kamu bulaw sa ku Hulam tu Sakizaya a tademaw. . babulawan 戰場 na u babulawan kina alangahay.這條河曾是戰場. bulawan 戰爭 bulawan nu Hulam ku Takubuwan i a miheca siwaay a bulad, katuud ku mapataay u zuma milaliw tacuwacuwa a niyazu'. 1878 年的 9 . mababulaw 打仗 mababulaw ku Sakizaya atu Hulam i sumamad. . mabulaw 被戰敗 mabulaw nu Hulam ku Takubuwan. 達固湖灣被清兵戰敗. mibulaw 發動戰爭 mibulaw ku ada tu niyazu' niyam. . nababulawan 戰爭過之地 nababulawan i tawya ku Takubuwan. .
S.PHON: u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam:*** tinaku a kamu bur~ɾaw sa ku ħur~ɾam tu sakizaja a tadəmaw. . babur~ɾawan ** na u babur~ɾawan kina ar~ɾaŋaħaj.*******. bur~ɾawan ** bur~ɾawan nu ħur~ɾam ku takubuwan i a miħəʦa siwaaj a bur~ɾad, katuud ku mapataaj u zuma mir~ɾar~ɾiw taʦuwaʦuwa a nijazuʔ~ʡ. **** ** * . mababur~ɾaw ** mababur~ɾaw ku sakizaja atu ħur~ɾam i sumamad. . mabur~ɾaw *** mabur~ɾaw nu ħur~ɾam ku takubuwan. *********. mibur~ɾaw **** mibur~ɾaw ku ada tu nijazuʔ~ʡ nijam. . nababur~ɾawan ***** nababur~ɾawan i tawja ku takubuwan. .
